title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Federal Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Federal Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Federal Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
